subject: [PATCH 5/6] mm/migrate_device: move softleaf_to_folio() inside device-private branch

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand (Arm)
reviews.summary: Identified that the patch fixes an issue where softleaf_to_folio() was called on a non-present PMD, and acknowledged that it's a safe change to make.

2026-06-30.patch_summary: This patch moves the softleaf_to_folio() call inside a device-private branch in mm/migrate_device.c to prevent unsafe folio lookups for PMD swap entries.
